protagonist.name: 袋鼠小跳
protagonist.appearance: 棕色毛皮，巨大強壯後腿，胸前口袋，身穿籃球背心，尖耳會隨興奮度豎起，粗壯尾巴保持平衡
protagonist.personality: 驕傲自信、愛炫技、過度自信

supporting_coach.name: 獅子王教練
supporting_coach.appearance: 金色鬃毛，威嚴面容，戴著口哨，身穿教練服，鬃毛會隨怒氣燃燒

opponents.name: 狼群隊
opponents.appearance: 灰色毛皮，尖牙利爪，團隊合作無間
opponents.personality: 狡猾冷靜、善於抓住機會

teamates.name: 兔子快斗
teamates.appearance: 白色毛皮，長長兔耳會隨速度豎起，短尾巴，三瓣嘴

teamates.name: 熊大力
teamates.appearance: 白色毛皮，巨大身軀，厚實熊掌，黑色鼻子

teamates.name: 猴子聰明
teamates.appearance: 棕色短毛，長尾巴，靈活四肢，聪慧眼神
teamates.personality: 機靈鬼點子多、愛開玩笑

teamates.name: 青蛙跳跳
teamates.appearance: 綠色皮膚，大眼睛，長舌頭，強壯後腿

scenes.name: 宇宙決賽開場
scenes.description: 太空球場，地球在背景，觀眾是各種外星動物。巨大計分板顯示100比90領先10分！袋鼠小跳是超級明星，帶領兔子快斗、熊大力、猴子聰明、青蛙跳跳四位隊友，挺著胸膛，尾巴驕傲搖擺

dialogue.line: 宇宙動物籃球總決賽現場！袋鼠隊正以100比90領先狼群隊！
哈哈！我們贏定了！再進一球就結束比賽！
袋鼠隊！袋鼠隊！宇宙最強！
小跳，穩住，時間還有。
我會守住籃板，放心！
太酷了！我們要拿冠軍了！
袋鼠隊距離勝利只差最後一攻！
(自信笑容) 交給我吧！
冷靜，比賽還沒結束。大家保持專注！

sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Futuristic space basketball court, planet Earth and stars in background, floating court platform with energy barriers, cosmic nebula colors, sci-fi architecture, epic establishing shot, 4K quality

Kangaroo team lineup entering court, Kangaroo Xiaotiao center with jersey #10, white rabbit player Rabbit Kaito with #1, huge polar bear Bear Dali with #5, clever monkey player Monkey Congming with #8, green frog player Frog Tiaotiao with #11, all wearing matching basketball jerseys, confident team pose, modern anime style

Giant holographic scoreboard floating in space showing Kangaroo team 100 vs Wolf team 90 in bright neon numbers, 10-point lead, high-tech display, energy effects, scoreboard dominates the scene, space background, cinematic lighting

Kangaroo Xiaotiao standing center with teammates behind him, pointing at scoreboard confidently, Rabbit Kaito on left with sharp eyes, Bear Dali huge and steady, Monkey Congming grinning playfully, Frog Tiaotiao calm and focused, team unity, heroic pose, modern anime style
Alien animal audience in stands cheering, various colorful alien creatures, tentacles and multiple eyes, excited expressions, waving flags, space stadium atmosphere, vibrant colors

Kangaroo Xiaotiao center celebrating with arms raised, Rabbit Kaito giving thumbs up, Bear Dali pounding chest proudly, Monkey Congming doing backflip excitedly, Frog Tiaotiao tongue out happy, team victory pose, basketball court, celebratory atmosphere, anime style

Bird's eye view of space basketball court, Kangaroo team on one side with 5 players, Wolf team on other side, Earth visible below, crowd surrounds the court, geometric court lines, cosmic backdrop, epic scale

Medium close-up of Kangaroo Xiaotiao's face, confident smirk, sharp eyes, pointed ears perked up, brown fur texture, basketball jersey visible, anime style face, confident expression, emotional buildup

Dynamic composition with Kangaroo Xiaotiao center, 4 teammates surrounding him in formation, all pointing upward together, scoreboard in background showing 100-90 lead, unity pose, basketball court, epic team moment, modern anime style

scenes.name: 獅子教練的警告
scenes.description: 獅子王教練叫暫停，鬃毛威嚴飄動，冷靜說「穩住球就贏了，我們領先10分」。袋鼠小跳表面點頭，內心不服。隊友們在旁邊擔心觀望

dialogue.line: 大家聽著！我們領先10分，時間不多！穩住球就贏了！
小跳，不要做多餘的動作！簡單上籃！
是...是的教練...我知道了...
(小聲對青蛙) 我覺得小跳不會聽...
(內心獨白) 哼！穩住？太無聊了！我要讓全宇宙記住我！
記住！畫蛇添足只會搞砸一切！
(眼神飄忽) 教練你放心...我會的...
(擔心地) 小跳，真的要聽教練的話...
(嘆氣) 我有種不好的預感...

sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Lion coach addressing Kangaroo team in huddle, teammates listening seriously, Rabbit Kaito with sharp focused eyes, Bear Dali nodding seriously, Monkey Congming scratching head, Frog Tiaotiao calm, Kangaroo Xiaotiao trying to look obedient, tense team atmosphere, modern anime style

Over-the-shoulder shot, Lion coach talking sternly to Kangaroo Xiaotiao, Xiaotiao visible from behind, teammates watching in background with worried expressions, coach's face serious, calm gesture, basketball court background, tense atmosphere
Kangaroo Xiaotiao nodding obediently, polite smile, but eyes darting away, double expression - surface agreement vs inner rebellion, subtle facial details, anime style

Kangaroo team teammates looking worried, Rabbit Kaito frowning with concern, Bear Dali scratching head confused, Monkey Congming whispering to Frog Tiaotiao, Frog Tiaotiao's big eyes worried, group reaction shot, anime style
Thought bubble above Kangaroo Xiaotiao showing small demon kangaroo version, red eyes, mischievous grin, encouraging rebellion, visual metaphor, inner conflict representation
Close-up of Lion coach's golden mane flowing majestically, hair strands visible, warm backlighting, majestic and authoritative, detailed fur texture, cinematic quality
Kangaroo Xiaotiao looking away nervously, eyes darting sideways, fake smile, ears slightly back, body language showing disagreement, subtle emotional cues, anime expression

sub_shots.focus: 兔子快斗和熊大力交換眼神
sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Rabbit Kaito and Bear Dali exchanging worried glances, Rabbit's long ears flat with concern, Bear's massive face showing unease, teammates sensing trouble, unspoken communication, basketball court background

Dramatic composition, Lion coach on left stern, Kangaroo Xiaotiao on right with hidden rebellion, teammates in background with concerned expressions, split lighting, tension crackling, space court background, anime dramatic scene

scenes.name: 究極絕招啟動
scenes.description: 袋鼠小跳拿到球，大喊「究極百連招！」開始瘋狂運球！後撤步！轉身！胯下！背後！袋鼠跳躍！動作產生閃電環繞

dialogue.line: 袋鼠小跳拿到球！最後一攻開始！
究極百連招！啟動！讓全宇宙見識我的厲害！
小跳！你在幹什麼？！
哇塞！太誇張了吧！
等等！這招太危險了！
後撤步！轉身！胯下！背後！
袋鼠跳躍！哈哈哈！
閃電環繞！究極連招！

sub_shots.focus: 袋鼠小跳接到球，隊友散開
sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Kangaroo Xiaotiao receiving basketball from Rabbit Kaito, teammates spreading out on court, Bear Dali moving to post position, Monkey Congming running to wing, Frog Tiaotiao spotting up, team offensive formation, shounen anime style

Kangaroo Xiaotiao shouting with intense expression, mouth open yelling, eyes blazing with determination, dramatic energy lines, teammates visible in background surprised by shout, anime power-up moment, dynamic angle

sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Kangaroo Xiaotiao dribbling basketball at incredible speed, motion blur, tail spinning for balance, teammates watching from corners with amazed expressions, Rabbit Kaito sharp eyes tracking, powerful stance, low angle dramatic shot, athletic prowess, energy effects

sub_shots.focus: 袋鼠跳躍絕技，全隊抬頭仰望
sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Kangaroo Xiaotiao jumping incredibly high with powerful hind legs, basketball held high, soaring through air, all 4 teammates looking up in amazement from below, space background visible, epic leap, maximum vertical, teammates' upturned faces

sub_shots.focus: 閃電環繞的究極連招，隊友震驚
sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Kangaroo Xiaotiao performing ultimate combo move, lightning effects surrounding body, flame trails, action blur and afterimages, electric blue and orange energy, teammates at edges of frame with shocked and worried expressions, overwhelming power, shounen anime climax

scenes.name: 100連招的瘋狂
scenes.description: 袋鼠小跳持續添加動作！360度旋轉！720度翻轉！單手倒立運球！袋鼠後腿瘋狂動作！球開始不聽話，發光震動

dialogue.line: 停...停下來！我看不清了！
小跳！球！球不對勁！
我的天！那球在發光！
(驚恐) 小跳！快停下！球要失控了！
單手倒立！袋鼠旋風腿！
哈哈哈！100連招！完成！我才是最強的！
第100招...即將完成...球開始震動！

sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Kangaroo Xiaotiao spinning 360 degrees rapidly, multiple poses overlapping, spiral visual effect, teammates Rabbit Kaito and Bear Dali looking dizzy trying to follow, dizziness implied, colorful motion trails, surreal sports anime style

Kangaroo Xiaotiao flipping 720 degrees in air, impossible acrobatic move, tail spinning, basketball trailing behind, Monkey Congming with jaw dropped and eyes popping out, physics-defying action, extreme sports moment

sub_shots.focus: 單手倒立運球，全隊驚恐
sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Kangaroo Xiaotiao doing one-handed handstand while dribbling with other hand, incredible balance, tail pointing up, all teammates visible with shocked/scared expressions, amazed audience in background, show-off moment getting dangerous
Close-up of Kangaroo Xiaotiao's powerful hind legs in rapid motion, muscles tensed, fur rippling, multiple leg positions overlapping, speed lines, raw power display

Basketball glowing with unstable energy, vibrating intensely, electric sparks, cracks appearing, ball developing consciousness, Frog Tiaotiao's big eyes watching ball with worry, warning signs, supernatural effects
Kangaroo Xiaotiao with ears perked up excitedly, crazy expression, eyes wide, manic smile, enjoying the chaos, adrenaline rush, anime excitement

sub_shots.focus: 計數器快速跳到100，隊友恐慌
sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Digital action counter rapidly counting up, numbers flying: 90...95...100 in neon display, teammates Bear Dali and Monkey Congming exchanging panicked looks in background, speed lines, overwhelming information, digital interface, visual chaos

sub_shots.focus: 多個動作重疊，隊友混亂
sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Chaotic montage of multiple Kangaroo Xiaotiao poses overlapping, different moves visible simultaneously, action blur, psychedelic colors, teammates at edges looking completely lost and confused, overwhelming visual, maximum chaos

Number 100 flashing in giant neon, Kangaroo Xiaotiao surrounded by energy explosion, blinding light, ball glowing dangerously, everything vibrating, all 4 teammates in background covering eyes in terror, peak of insanity, psychedelic anime climax

scenes.name: 球飛走了
scenes.description: 「砰！」動作太複雜！球自己飛走了！飛向太空！袋鼠小跳失去平衡，超級誇張的摔倒！慢動作！尾巴無法保持平衡

dialogue.line: 「砰！」球飛走了！
糟了！球飛向太空！
(驚恐) 不...不會吧！
小跳！失去平衡了！
尾巴！尾巴無法平衡！
我的媽呀！
啊啊啊！我的尾巴！停不下來！
(全場倒吸一口氣)
超級誇張的摔倒！慢動作！悲劇時刻！

sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Comic-style 'BANG' explosion text effect, giant red letters, impact lines radiating outward, all 4 teammates visible at edges with terrified expressions, dramatic freeze frame, manga sound effect, explosive moment
Basketball flying away into space leaving glowing orange trail, ball shrinking into distance, stars visible, space background, tragic trajectory, cinematic
Kangaroo Xiaotiao's shocked face, jaw dropped, eyes wide in horror, ears straight up in alarm, realization of failure, extreme expression, anime shock

sub_shots.focus: 失去平衡瞬間，隊友伸手
sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Kangaroo Xiaotiao losing balance, body tilting backward, arms flailing, tail failing to stabilize, Rabbit Kaito and Monkey Congming reaching out helplessly from background, center of gravity lost, slow-motion fall beginning
Close-up of Kangaroo Xiaotiao's tail thrashing wildly, unable to maintain balance, tail wrapped around itself, physics failing, desperate attempt to recover

sub_shots.focus: 超級誇張摔倒慢動作，隊友絕望

Worm's eye view of Kangaroo Xiaotiao falling toward camera, body silhouetted against space, dramatic lighting, slow-motion, impending impact

Alien animal audience AND Kangaroo teammates in collective shock, jaws dropped, eyes wide, silent moment, frozen expressions, Rabbit Kaito's ears flat, Bear Dali hands on cheeks, dramatic pause before chaos, group reaction shot

sub_shots.focus: 球飛走+小跳摔倒+隊友絕望全景
sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Epic disaster composition, basketball flying into space on left, Kangaroo Xiaotiao falling in slow-motion center, all 4 teammates watching in horror with expressive body language, shocked crowd background, space court, dramatic tragedy, cinematic storytelling

scenes.name: 絕望的逆轉
scenes.description: 狼群隊撿到球，輕鬆上籃得分！計分板變成100比93！雖然袋鼠隊還領先7分，但裁判判罰小跳技術犯規！狼隊獲得罰球機會連得8分！最終比分100比101，袋鼠隊輸了1分！全場外星動物安靜3秒，然後爆笑！

dialogue.line: (大笑) 謝謝你的禮物！這球我們拿了！
狼群隊輕鬆上籃得分！100比93！
等等！裁判判罰技術犯規！狼隊獲得罰球機會！
完了...
為什麼...
這不可能...
狼隊連得8分！最終比分101比100！
(絕望) 不...不...我們輸了1分...
哈哈哈哈！史上最蠢的失誤！

sub_shots.focus: 狼群隊撿到球，袋鼠隊來不及反應
sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Wolf team player picking up loose basketball, gray fur, sharp teeth, Kangaroo teammates too slow to react, Rabbit Kaito and Bear Dali scrambling but too late, determined expression, teamwork moment, athletic move, opportunity seized
Wolf player easily scoring layup, no defense, simple shot, basketball going through hoop, effortless point, contrasting with Xiaotiao's failed complexity

Scoreboard dramatically showing final score Kangaroo 100 - Wolf 101 in big red letters, Wolf team winning by 1 point, digital animation effect, devastating one-point loss, mocking display, brutal transition

Entire Kangaroo team in despair, Kangaroo Xiaotiao collapsed face-down center, teammates Rabbit Kaito kneeling with head down, Bear Dali slumped shoulders, Monkey Congming hands on head, Frog Tiaotiao eyes closed, team total defeat posture, shame and despair, tragic group

Close-up shot of multiple Kangaroo team members with ears flat - Xiaotiao's kangaroo ears down, Rabbit Kaito's long rabbit ears flat, Frog Tiaotiao's frog features sad, defeated body language in shame, emotional detail

sub_shots.focus: 小跳和兔子快斗尾巴無力

Entire space stadium in complete silence, frozen moment, alien audience shocked still, Kangaroo team frozen in despair positions, time stopped, dramatic pause, visual silence, atmospheric shot
Alien animal audience erupting in laughter, pointing at court, mocking expressions, tears of laughter, cruel humor, devastating crowd reaction

sub_shots.focus: 狼群慶祝1分險勝vs袋鼠隊絕望
sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Split screen composition, left: Wolf team celebrating 101-100 victory together, right: Entire Kangaroo team collapsed in despair after losing by 1 point - Xiaotiao center, teammates around him defeated, center: scoreboard showing 100-101 final score, devastating contrast, dark comedic anime style

scenes.name: 火焰獅子的誕生
scenes.description: 獅子王教練憤怒到極限！「轟！」鬃毛著火！變成火焰獅子！高達10米！全身燃燒！走向小跳，大地震動！

dialogue.line: (憤怒到極限) 小跳...你這個...白癡！！！
(顫抖) 教...教練...你的鬃毛...
「轟！」鬃毛著火！爆炸特效！
(恐懼) 大家快跑！獅子變身了！
(尖叫) 救命啊！火焰獅子！
(結巴) 十...十米高的火焰獅子！
這就是畫蛇添足的下場！
大地震動！全隊驚恐！
(瑟瑟發抖) 對...對不起...

sub_shots.focus: 獅子教練憤怒表情，全隊恐懼
sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Lion coach face showing extreme anger, veins visible, eyes blazing, mane starting to smoke, rage building, all 4 teammates visible in background with terrified expressions, Rabbit Kaito hiding behind Bear Dali, intense emotion, anime anger

sub_shots.focus: 鬃毛開始著火，隊友驚恐後退
sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Lion coach's golden mane catching fire, flames spreading from roots, magical fire, intense orange glow, teammates backing away in fear - Monkey Congming and Frog Tiaotiao retreating, transformation beginning, supernatural event
Giant 'BOOM' text in flames, volcanic explosion effect, fire and smoke, all 4 teammates knocked backward by shockwave, dramatic transformation trigger, impact frame, mythological power
Lion coach metamorphosing into Fire Lion, entire body engulfed in flames, godlike transformation, elemental power, mythical creature, epic anime transformation

Fire Lion towering 10 meters tall, extreme low angle shot, massive scale, blocking out light, all 4 teammates visible as tiny terrified figures at the base, intimidating presence, giant monster, mythological beast
Close-up of Fire Lion's body covered in intense flames, fire texture, heat distortion, molten appearance, elemental transformation detail, realistic fire

sub_shots.focus: 小跳和隊友變得像老鼠一樣小
sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Kangaroo Xiaotiao and all 4 teammates tiny like mice at Fire Lion's feet, dramatic size contrast, David vs Goliath scale, intimidation factor, perspective shot showing entire cowering team

sub_shots.focus: 大地震動裂開，隊友站立不穩
sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Space court ground cracking and breaking apart from Fire Lion's power, fissures spreading, debris floating, all teammates losing balance and falling from earthquake, structural damage, overwhelming force

Fire Lion walking toward tiny Kangaroo Xiaotiao and his terrified teammates huddled together, flames trailing, each step shaking ground, intimidating approach to entire team, mythological judgment, epic confrontation, orange and red color palette

scenes.name: 永遠的禁賽
scenes.description: 袋鼠小跳被宇宙籃球協會永遠禁賽！球衣被撕碎！跪在太空球場，耳朵完全貼平，尾巴無力垂下，背景是嘲笑的外星動物

dialogue.line: 宇宙籃球協會公告：袋鼠小跳因技術犯規及不當行為，被判處終身禁賽！
球衣被撕碎！象徵性的毀滅！
(落淚) 小跳...
(哽咽) 隊長...
(哭泣) 我們再也沒有隊長了...
(崩潰哭喊) 不！我的籃球生涯！
(嘆氣) 這就是...過度炫耀的下場...
畫蛇添足，適得其反。這就是你的教訓。
畫蛇添足 - Adding unnecessary things spoils perfection

sub_shots.focus: 宇宙籃球協會公告，隊友震驚
sub_shots.nano_banana_prompt: Official holographic announcement: 'BANNED FOR LIFE', official seal, space basketball association logo, all 4 teammates visible in foreground with shocked/sad expressions, formal text, legal document style, digital display

sub_shots.focus: 球衣被撕碎，隊友不忍直視
